text_original: I like this app, but the mask(persona) feature is the only problem for me. The persona feature is too limited.
text_zh: 我喜欢这个应用，但面具（人格）功能是我唯一的问题。人格功能受限太多了。
reply_original: Thank you for the 4-star review! I'm glad you like Fantasia. Regarding the persona limits, I've shared your feedback with our product team to explore expanding this feature. We want your experience to be as personalized as possible! Please send more details about the specific limitations you're facing to support@fantachat.ai. We're all ears!
reply_zh: 感谢您的四星好评！很高兴您喜欢 Fantasia。关于人格设定的限制，我已经将您的反馈分享给了产品团队，以探讨扩展此功能的可能性。我们希望您的体验能尽可能个性化！请将您面临的具体限制详情发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们洗耳恭听！
